improvement_evidence: Modularized the multi-agent IDE chat architecture using AutoGen >= 0.4.x GroupChat mechanisms.
Integrated a Mock ChatCompletionClient to guarantee independent execution and testing predictability.
Implemented precise termination conditions combining TextMessageTermination and MaxMessageTermination for robust control flows.

optimized_knowledge.description: An automated multi-agent IDE development workflow leveraging AutoGen group chat architecture.
execution_steps: 1. Instantiate MockChatCompletionClient to bypass external API requirements during testing.
2. Setup Agent nodes (Coder, Reviewer) configured with specific system prompts focusing on IDE constraints.
4. Initialize RoundRobinGroupChat with participants and termination conditions.
5. Await the run execution with the user task.
optimized_knowledge.code_snippet:
ide_team = RoundRobinGroupChat(participants=[coder, reviewer], termination_condition=termination)
result = await ide_team.run(task=task)

next_suggestion: Continue refining the mock client capabilities to simulate more complex error recovery interactions, specifically tracing syntax validation errors fed back to the Coder.
